primary.usage: Main CTA buttons, hero text highlight, feature card borders/icons

secondary.usage: Green accents, ✓ icons in feature lists, footer hover, default CTA
secondary.100_usage: Feature card background (secondary variant), booking card gradient start

tertiary.100_usage: Feature card background (tertiary variant), booking card gradient end

quaternary.100_usage: Feature card background (quaternary variant), contact icon bg

scale.h1_hero: text-[3rem] font-bold leading-none font-sans (used in Hero via HighlightedText)
scale.caption: text-sm

richText.note: Apply .rich-text class to a container for full heading/list/blockquote/code styles (defined in globals.css)

highlightedText.description: HighlightedText component renders inline color spans. Wrap a word in [brackets] for primary color, {braces} for secondary color.
highlightedText.example_usage: <HighlightedText text={title} tag='h1' className='text-[3rem] font-bold' color='text-primary' secondColor='text-secondary' />

primary.tailwind: bg-primary inline-flex justify-center items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg text-white

secondary.tailwind: px-8 py-3 text-lg font-semibold border rounded-2xl border-black text-black

default.tailwind: bg-secondary px-8 py-3 text-lg font-semibold rounded-2xl text-white

booking_cta.tailwind: w-full rounded-xl px-6 py-4 text-lg font-bold bg-secondary text-white hover:scale-[1.02] hover:shadow-lg active:scale-[0.98] transition-all

booking_back.tailwind: w-fit bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary-100/60 to-tertiary-100/60 rounded-xl px-8 py-3 text-crema-800 font-semibold border-secondary-100 border-[3px] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform

feature.description: Service/feature card with colored variant per category
feature.base: flex flex-col shadow-m items-center p-4 border-2 rounded-3xl hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 max-w-md

team.tailwind: bg-anti-flash_white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 lg:max-w-md mx-4 my-4

booking_selector.tailwind: bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary-100/60 to-tertiary-100/60 rounded-3xl p-6 border-secondary-100 border-[4px]

quote_philosophy.description: Quote or philosophy panel (used in Team section)
quote_philosophy.tailwind: bg-gradient-to-br drop-shadow-md from-secondary-100/60 via-anti-flash_white-100 to-tertiary-100/60 rounded-[2.5rem] p-10 lg:p-6 min-h-[300px]

navbar.description: Fixed top navbar with scroll-shrink animation
navbar.scrolled: transition delay-150 duration-300 rounded-full scale-75 drop-shadow-xl bg-anti-flash_white

icons.social_footer: w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-crema-800 hover:bg-secondary hover:text-black text-secondary transition-colors

hero_images.float-slow: 12s ease-in-out infinite — gentle drift ±10px X, ±20px Y, ±5deg

animations.card_hover: hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 (feature cards), hover:-translate-y-1 (team cards)

forms.select: w-full rounded-xl border-2 border-secondary-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-crema-800 font-medium focus:border-secondary-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-secondary-200 transition-colors appearance-none
forms.label: text-sm font-semibold text-crema-800
